nasb.text: For on account of a harlot one is reduced to a loaf of bread, And an adulteress hunts for the precious life.

esv.text: for the price of a prostitute is only a loaf of bread, but a married woman  hunts down a precious life.

cnv.text: 因為妓女使人只剩一塊餅， 通姦的婦人獵取人寶貴的生命。

ccb.text: 因为娼妓会使人倾家荡产， 淫妇会猎杀人宝贵的生命。

csbs.text: 要知道，为了妓女， 人会卑贱如一块饼； 而通奸的女人，会猎取宝贵的性命。
